title: Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services:
Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services!
